entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00109) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00109 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR CASE MANAGEMENT OPERATIONS AND MAINTENANCE (O&M) SUPPORT AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.
THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY:
14(A) IN ACCORDANCE WITH TSAAMS CLAUSE 3.2.4-34 "OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES 3.2.4-34 (FEB 2003)," THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR CLIN 5021AA-1 AND OPTIONAL SUB-CLIN 5021AA-1A ARE HEREBY EXTENDED THROUGH MAY 18, 2014 AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT TO ALLOW FOR THE CONTINUATION OF CASE MANAGEMENT OPERATIONS AND MAINTENANCE (O&M) SUPPORT, INCLUDING OOI HOTLINE AFTER DEPLOYMENT, AS WELL AS THE DEPLOYMENT OF 15 DEFECT RELEASES (DR).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00110) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00110 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 6004BA "ON-SITE: AIRPORT ASSESSMENT." THIS SUB-CLIN WILL BE FUNDED ON THE OPTION PERIOD 5 TASK ORDER (HSTS01-14-J-HRM025) PER MODIFICATION P00001.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00112) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00112 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCORPORATE BY REFERENCE THE CLIN X002 RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES APPROVAL PROCESS INCLUDING THE RECRUITMENT PRE-EVENT/ACTIVITY COST APPROVAL REQUEST CHECKLIST MUTUALLY AGREED UPON BY BOTH TSA AND LM. THESE DOCUMENTS SHALL BE CONSIDERED LIVING DOCUMENTS AND MAY ONLY BE MODIFIED THROUGH THE HRACCESS CONTRACT'S JOINT CHANGE CONTROL BOARD (JCCB). ---------------------------------------------- ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00113) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION P00113 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF CLINS 5028 "CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM - LEGACY DATA MIGRATION," 5029 "CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM - DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT," 5030 "CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM - TESTING AND DEPLOYMENT," AND 5031 "BI-WEEKLY CASE MANAGEMENT IPT MEETING" TO MATCH THE CURRENT EXERCISED POP DUE TO FINANCIAL SYSTEM LIMITATIONS.
AS A RESULT OF THIS MODIFICATION, THE FOLLOWING CHANGES HEREBY TAKE PLACE:
A.) THE POP OF CLINS 5029, 5030, AND 5031 ARE HEREBY UPDATED:
FROM: SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 - JANUARY 2, 2017 TO: SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 - JANUARY 1, 2015
B.) THE POP OF CLIN 5028 IS HEREBY UPDATED:
FROM: MAY 7, 2013 - JANUARY 2, 2017 TO: MAY 7, 2013 - JANUARY 1, 2015
C.) THE POP OF CLINS 5028, 5029, 5030, AND 5031 WILL BE EXTENDED TO MATCH THE POP OF EACH SUB-CLIN EXECUTED UNDER IT DURING EACH OPTION PERIOD.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00115 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE SUB-CLINS 5021AA-1A "O&M FOR DELTA REQUIREMENTS (EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD / OOI / OPR)" AND 5029A-1 "UDRS - DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT DELTA FIXED FEE." THESE SUB-CLINS WILL BE FUNDED ON THE CASE MANAGEMENT TASK ORDER (HSTS01-11-J-DAD003) PER MODIFICATION P00019.
